title: Funckia nervosa
taxonomy: Funckia nervosa is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is a member of the genus Funckia and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Within the family Apiaceae, Funckia nervosa is classified under the subfamily Apioideae, which is one of the largest and most diverse subfamilies of the family. The genus Funckia is further grouped under the tribe Oenantheae, which contains species with similar characteristics and growth habits. Funckia nervosa is a unique species within its classification due to its distinctive features and adaptations to its native habitat.
